stemHtml:
Using the information given below, calculate the minimum required fuel for a Commercial Air Transport flight in accordance with Reduced Contingency Fuel procedure. An en-route alternate is available for the optional refuel destination and no destination alternate requirements exist for both destination aerodromes.

Taxi Fuel: 220 kg 
Trip Fuel to Decision Point: 7770 kg 
Trip Fuel from Decision Point to commercial destination: 2220 kg 
Trip Fuel from Decision Point to optional refuel destination: 2440 kg 
Final Reserve Fuel: 1100 kg 
Additional Fuel: not required 
Extra Fuel: not required 
Discretionary Fuel: not required
